title: paraphlomis shunchangensis var. shunchangensis
intro: Paraphlomis shunchangensis var. shunchangensis, also known as Shunchang paraphlomis, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine and has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Shunchang paraphlomis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, it is often used in combination with other plants to create teas, infusions, or decoctions that can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
